name: Gog
description: Google Workspace CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Tasks, Sheets, Docs, and Slides.
prompt:
# gog Use `gog` for Gmail/Calendar/Drive/Contacts/Tasks/Sheets/Docs/Slides. Requires OAuth setup. IMPORTANT: - If Cowork OS built-in Google Workspace tools are available (`gmail_action`, `calendar_action`, `google_drive_action`) or the Google Workspace MCP connector is available, prefer those for non-technical user requests. - Use `gog` when built-in/MCP tools are unavailable or the user explicitly wants the CLI approach. Setup (once) - `gog auth credentials /path/to/client_secret.json` - `gog auth add you@gmail.com --services gmail,calendar,drive,contacts,docs,sheets,tasks,slides` - `gog auth list` Re-authentication (token expired / invalid_grant) - There is NO `gog auth refresh` command. - If a Gmail/Calendar/Tasks/Slides call fails with `invalid_grant` (expired/revoked token): - `gog auth list` - Optional cleanup: `gog auth remove you@gmail.com` - Re-authorize: `gog auth add you@gmail.com --services gmail,calendar,drive,contacts,docs,sheets,tasks,slides` - Alternative: `gog auth manage` (opens the account manager in the browser) When helping non-technical users, prefer UI language like: "Reconnect Google Workspace in Settings > Integrations" instead of telling them to run CLI commands. Common commands - Gmail search: `gog gmail search 'newer_than:7d' --max 10` - Gmail messages search (per email, ignores threading): `gog gmail messages search "in:inbox from:ryanair.com" --max 20 --account you@example.com` - Gmail send (plain): `gog gmail send --to a@b.com --subject "Hi" --body "Hello"` - Gmail send (multi-line): `gog gmail send --to a@b.com --subject "Hi" --body-file ./message.txt` - Gmail send (stdin): `gog gmail send --to a@b.com --subject "Hi" --body-file -` - Gmail send (HTML): `gog gmail send --to a@b.com --subject "Hi" --body-html "

Hello

"` - Gmail draft: `gog gmail drafts create --to a@b.com --subject "Hi" --body-file ./message.txt` - Gmail send draft: `gog gmail drafts send ` - Gmail reply: `gog gmail send --to a@b.com --subject "Re: Hi" --body "Reply" --reply-to-message-id ` - Calendar list events: `gog calendar events --from --to ` - Calendar create event: `gog calendar create --summary "Title" --from --to ` - Calendar create with color: `gog calendar create --summary "Title" --from --to --event-color 7` - Calendar update event: `gog calendar update --summary "New Title" --event-color 4` - Calendar show colors: `gog calendar colors` - Drive search: `gog drive search "query" --max 10` - Contacts: `gog contacts list --max 20` - Tasks list task lists: `gog tasks lists list --json` - Tasks create task list: `gog tasks lists create "Personal" --json` - Tasks list tasks: `gog tasks list --max 20 --json` - Tasks get task: `gog tasks get --json` - Tasks add: `gog tasks add --title "Follow up" --notes "Context" --due 2026-05-12 --json` - Tasks update: `gog tasks update --title "New title" --status needsAction --json` - Tasks complete/uncomplete: `gog tasks done --json` and `gog tasks undo --json` - Tasks delete/clear: `gog tasks delete --json` and `gog tasks clear --json` - Sheets get: `gog sheets get "Tab!A1:D10" --json` - Sheets update: `gog sheets update "Tab!A1:B2" --values-json '[["A","B"],["1","2"]]' --input USER_ENTERED` - Sheets append: `gog sheets append "Tab!A:C" --values-json '[["x","y","z"]]' --insert INSERT_ROWS` - Sheets clear: `gog sheets clear "Tab!A2:Z"` - Sheets metadata: `gog sheets metadata --json` - Docs export: `gog docs export --format txt --out /tmp/doc.txt` - Docs cat: `gog docs cat ` - Slides create: `gog slides create "Project Brief" --json` - Slides info: `gog slides info --json` - Slides copy: `gog slides copy "Copy title" --json` - Slides export: `gog slides export --format pptx --out ./deck.pptx --json` Notes - Prefer plain-text email; use `--body-file` for longer messages. - Use `gog calendar colors` before setting `--event-color`. - Set `GOG_ACCOUNT=you@gmail.com` to avoid repeating `--account`. - For scripting, prefer `--json` plus `--no-input`. - Sheets values can be passed via `--values-json` (recommended) or as inline rows. - Docs supports export/cat/copy. In-place edits require a Docs API client (not in gog). - `gog slides` supports create/info/copy/export; use the Google Workspace MCP connector for slide mutation such as adding text boxes or batchUpdate. - Confirm before sending mail, creating events, deleting tasks, clearing completed tasks, deleting files, sharing files, or creating/copying decks. - `gog gmail search` returns one row per thread; use `gog gmail messages search` when you need every individual email returned separately.

routing.useWhen: Use when the user asks to use the Google Workspace CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Tasks, Sheets, Docs, or Slides.
routing.dontUseWhen: Do not use when the request is asking for planning documents, high-level strategy, or non-executable discussion; use the relevant planning or design workflow instead.
routing.outputs: Outcome from Gog: task-specific result plus concrete action notes.
routing.successCriteria: Returns concrete actions and decisions matching the requested task, with no fabricated tool-side behavior.

positive: Use the gog skill for this request.
Use when the user asks to use the Google Workspace CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Tasks, Sheets, Docs, or Slides.
negative: Do not use when the request is asking for planning documents, high-level strategy, or non-executable discussion; use the relevant planning or design workflow instead.
